title: Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd!
